text: The subject is located in a neighborhood on the eastside of Bloomington, IL. It is a multi-family detached traditional designed three-unit dwelling. It conforms to most other existing 2-4 units in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment. The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Locust St, to the South by Oakland Ave, to the East by Towanda Ave, and to the West by Main St.
